\tzpentry{ID5571}{Angular Velocity Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5571 introduces Angular Velocity Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\Omega}_i^{\mathrm{node}} = \nu_i + \sum_{j\neq i} C_{ij}\,\sin\!\big(\Omega_j^{\mathrm{node}}-\Omega_i^{\mathrm{node}}\big), \end{equation}
